description: Ownership map for Fusebase CLI and Fusebase Flow agent-facing surfaces. Flow recovery may write only flow-owned paths and shared-merge Flow additions.

owners.cli-owned: Current FuseBase CLI or project runtime configuration is authoritative. Flow may diagnose only.
owners.flow-owned: Fusebase Flow canonical source is authoritative. Recovery may restore from Flow source.
owners.shared-merge: Both layers contribute. Recovery may append or merge only the Flow-owned addition while preserving existing content.

paths.cli_action: Current FuseBase CLI owns the baseline and may refresh it.
paths.flow_action: Append the Fusebase Flow overlay block wrapped in CUSTOM:SKILL markers if missing.

paths.cli_action: Claude/project instructions remain authoritative when present.
paths.flow_action: Append the Fusebase Flow overlay block if missing.

paths.cli_action: Current FuseBase CLI owns CLI Stop hooks, permissions, and MCP server allowlist.
paths.flow_action: Merge missing Fusebase Flow lifecycle events and append Flow stop.py without removing existing hooks.

paths.cli_action: Current FuseBase CLI may manage MCP server entries.
paths.flow_action: Do not overwrite active config; preserve non-MCP settings such as codex_hooks, hooks_file, and skills_dir.

paths.cli_action: Current FuseBase CLI or project runtime owns MCP server configuration.
paths.flow_action: Diagnose collision only; never restore from Flow.

paths.cli_action: Current FuseBase CLI or project runtime owns Cursor MCP configuration.
paths.flow_action: Diagnose collision only; never restore from Flow.

paths.cli_action: FuseBase CLI project configuration is authoritative.
paths.flow_action: Diagnose collision only; never restore from Flow.

paths.cli_action: FuseBase CLI skill/version lock data is authoritative.
paths.flow_action: Diagnose collision only; never restore from Flow.

paths.cli_action: Current FuseBase CLI owns Claude hook helper scripts.
paths.flow_action: Diagnose only; Flow lifecycle handlers live under hooks/handlers and are wired through settings merge.

paths.cli_action: Current FuseBase CLI owns provider skill text and references.
paths.flow_action: Never restore these from Flow's bundled provider copy.

paths.cli_action: Current FuseBase CLI owns provider skill text and references.
paths.flow_action: Never restore these from Flow's bundled provider copy.
Restore from canonical root skills via mirror-skills.sh.
Restore from canonical root skills via mirror-skills.sh.

paths.cli_action: Current FuseBase CLI owns app-focused provider agents.
paths.flow_action: Never restore these from Flow.

paths.cli_action: Current FuseBase CLI owns app-focused provider agents.
paths.flow_action: Never restore these from Flow.
Restore from canonical root agents via mirror-agents.sh.
Restore from canonical root agents via mirror-agents.sh.
Restore slash command from Flow overlay template.
Flow owns local health/recovery tooling.
Flow owns lifecycle hook handlers.
Flow owns canonical lifecycle skills.
Flow owns canonical lifecycle agents.
Flow owns always-on lifecycle rules.
